3256970.name: A Conversation With A Magical Deer
3256970.description:
Life is full of surprises and new encounters. A Conversation With A Magical Deer is a game where you have a conversation with a magical deer.

The problem is that magical deer can be frustrating creatures and not want to talk to you.

This is a first person, 3D casual game. You will be facing a magical deer in a park. It is then up to you to initiate the conversation. Magical deer have been known to not want to play along so do not be surprised.
3256970.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
